contract.name: Clear Safely
contract.description: Use this when the board is mostly stable and your highest tile is anchored in a corner: make the safe sweep move that clears a matched pair without breaking your snake/monotonic order. It opens space

contract.name: Merge Matching Tiles
contract.description: Slide the board so two tiles with the same number collide and combine into one higher-value tile, like 2+2=4. Use this whenever matching tiles can merge, especially early on to create space and grow y

contract.name: Anchor High Tile
contract.description: Keep your highest tile locked in one corner (usually a bottom corner) and avoid moves that pull it away. Use this from the opening onward so lower tiles can stack beside it in descending order for saf

contract.name: Stabilize Corner Stack
contract.description: Keep your highest tile locked in a corner and build a descending row/column next to it (e.g., 32-16-8-4), using only the two “safe” directions that preserve that corner. Use this once your corner is e

contract.name: Preserve Anchor Space
contract.description: Keep one corner as your permanent home for the largest tile and preserve an adjacent empty “anchor” cell so the top row/column stays stable. Use this in mid-to-late game, especially when the board is
